message: startsWith() used as path containment check — bypassable via prefix confusion or symlinks (use path.resolve + path.sep): return normalizedPath.startsWith(path.sep);

startsWith() used as path containment check — bypassable via prefix confusion or symlinks (use path.resolve + path.sep): return pathDrive === dirDrive && normalizedPath.startsWith(normalizedDir.replace(/\\?$/, '\\'));
startsWith() used as path containment check — bypassable via prefix confusion or symlinks (use path.resolve + path.sep): return normalizedPath.startsWith(normalizedDir + path.sep);
